## Meeting Purpose

[Informal catch-up between Demetrios (MLOps) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss personal and business updates.](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company experiencing growth challenges: overhiring, talent mismatches, restructuring roles](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [New strategy: hiring 4 higher-cost managing editors to bridge skill gaps and free up leadership time](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Business improvements: closing more 2-workstream deals, 12-month commitments, only 1 churn](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Both facing parenting challenges with teething babies](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Topics

### Family Updates

  - [Demetrios: Wife struggling with sleep due to baby teething](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Marcel: Baby present during call, nanny sick](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Both commiserate on challenges of teething process (3-week cycles, on-and-off discomfort)](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### Company Growth and Challenges

  - [Rapid growth led to hiring/talent mismatches](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Expectation vs. reality gap in new hire performance](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Restructuring: Hiring 4 managing editors (2x cost) to create middle management layer](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Goal: Free up leadership time, improve support for lower-level staff](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Sales Process Hurdles

  - [Upselling difficulties: Clients excited but budget-constrained](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Progress: Closing more 2-workstream deals upfront](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Churn: Only 1 client (Air Ops) unexpectedly switched to human writers](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Cost-cutting: Cleaned up tool subscriptions (e.g., $4,500 Airtable bill reduced)](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [New CTO making significant positive impact](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Locking clients into 12-month commitments](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Onboard 4 new managing editors in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Continue focus on closing multi-workstream deals](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Monitor effectiveness of new team structure](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Maintain emphasis on securing 12-month client commitments](https://fathom.video/share/NoZyGqxX8SXF4AP8haftjaW-3Sth6Km6?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
